title: My Love
subTitle: Raj comes from a wealthy family. His domineering father wants him to marry the daughter of his best friend. But Raj falls in love with a budding singer.

title: Mohabbat Ki Arzoo
subTitle: A man wins the heart of the woman he loves by faking his identity, consequently facing strong disapproval from her skeptical family.

title: Ram Rajya
subTitle: Lord Rama returns to Ayodhya with his wife Sita after defeating Ravana in an epic battle. However, he exiles his wife when people start doubting her purity.

title: Sunghursh
subTitle: Kundan, a grandson of a powerful priest in Banaras, resists initiation into the elder's religion, which entails human sacrifice.

title: Waqt
subTitle: An earthquake tears a businessman's family apart. Years later, they reunite in a courtroom trial where the father meets his sons under unprecedented circumstances.

title: Babu
subTitle: Owing a debt of gratitude, a good-hearted rickshaw puller dedicates his time and earnings to a mother-daughter duo who has fallen on tough times.

title: Holi Ayee Re
subTitle: Taking advantage of her trusting nature, an unprincipled man seduces a village maiden, only to desert her in her time of need.

title: Izzat
subTitle: Constable Ram Chandra teaches his son Siddharth to be a diligent policeman and lead his life with honesty and dignity. Siddharth follows his advice until circumstances force him to leave his ideals.

title: Mangani
subTitle: Due to her appearance, a woman faces persistent challenges. Subjected to constant ridicule, she is rejected by numerous men, including her college crush.

title: Mangani

title: Phool Aur Angaar
subTitle: A young man rescues a woman from being molested but gets accused of the heinous crime instead. Trying to apprehend the miscreants, he gets caught in a web of deception and lies.

title: Suhana Safar
subTitle: Enticed by his poetry, Sapna travels to India from the US to meet the poet Ujjwala. There, she meets a man, Sunil, who falls for her but he decides to help her meet Ujjwala.

title: Aapas Ki Baat
subTitle: Kajal and Anand's love story is cut short after Kajal's family disapproves of their relationship. Years later, fate brings them back into each other's lives, but all is not as it seems.

title: Sholay
subTitle: Jai and Veeru, two ex-convicts, are hired by Thakur Baldev Singh, a retired policeman, to help him nab Gabbar Singh, a notorious dacoit, who has spread havoc in the village of Ramgarh.

title: Phandebaaz
subTitle: Rajkumar, a poor young man, enters a town and meets Rana, his rich look-alike. He impersonates him and falls in love with a rich girl.

title: Phandebaaz
subTitle: Rajkumar, a poor young man, enters a town and meets Rana, his rich look-alike. He impersonates him and falls in love with a rich girl.

title: Baazigar
subTitle: A cold-blooded killer with a vendetta charms a businessman's elder daughter and then kills her in a way that would make it seem like a case of suicide. He then plots to destroy the rest of the family.

title: Bade Dil Wala
subTitle: After losing his daughter Juhi in a train accident, Sinha meets her husband Vijay and makes him his heir. Later, a doctor shows up with an amnesiac Juhi and a dark secret about Vijay.

title: Dushman Duniya ka
subTitle: Mahesh, a man of integrity, discovers his son Lucky's drug use with dismay. However, though Lucky vows to quit, circumstances cause him to relapse.

title: The Don
subTitle: A mysterious person vigilantly protects Vijay and his mother from notorious goons. His reasons for protecting them remain an unreolsved enigma.
